items.title: US and Iran exchange strikes and accuse each other of violating ceasefire
items.dek: Iran says it has launched retaliatory attacks at US infrastructure in Kuwait and Bahrain after the US said it hit multiple targets across Iran.
items.body: Iran says it has launched retaliatory attacks at US infrastructure in Kuwait and Bahrain after the US said it hit multiple targets across Iran.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Uruguay federation reportedly cancels charter flight after World Cup elimination
items.dek: Players will have to fly home through commercial flights instead. submitted by /u/JaQ-o-Lantern [link] [comments]
